name: Henry Nguyen
about: I'm a software engineer building clean, intuitive web experiences and learning how to design reliable, scalable systems. I studied computer science at UCLA and am now pursuing my master's at USC.

I'm currently a software engineer intern at Vitu, where I'm migrating a 1,000+ employee intranet to Next.js. Along the way, I've integrated enterprise search and Google Cloud SSO workflows to streamline access for teams company-wide.

Previously, I was active on campus through Creative Labs, the Garrick Institute for the Risk Sciences, and the Daily Bruin — building real-time analytics pipelines, React dashboards for ML research tools, and UI components for UCLA's daily newspaper. Across all three, I focused on shipping clean, reliable interfaces for real users, from 50+ product testers to 5,000+ daily readers.
Outside of work, you can usually find me playing volleyball or making music. I run Yolobun Studios, a creative collective built on music, community, and culture.
